title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: A video tutorial explaining AWS IAM fundamentals for beginners, covering users, roles, policies, least privilege principles, and IAM Access Analyzer. The content addresses common access denial errors and best practices like avoiding access keys in code.
